problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Quantum tunneling through energy barrier is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
